THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, MATTHEW W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $323.25 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $353.25, THE UNAVAILABILITY OF THE CONTRACTOR'S LOG BOOK SUBPOENAED BY PLAINTIFF CORROBORATES CLAIM THAT CONSTRUCTION ZONE NOT POSTED ADEQUATELY IN ADVANCE OF TOW. THE AMOUNT OF THE TOWING AND STORAGE FEE PAID BY PLAINTIFF WAS $323.25. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
